channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Spring 2027 Study Abroad Application Now Open!
item.description: The application for spring 2027 study abroad is now open. Undergraduates can log into the study abroad application portal with their RCS ID and password. Visit the Education Abroad website for details: https://isss.rpi.edu/education-abroad. Questions? Contact Karen Dvorak, Education Abroad Program Manager, dvorak2@rpi.edu.
item.author: Students

item.title: Add a Little Whimsy to Your Study Routine: Silent Reads @ Folsom Library on July 15th
item.description: Date: Wednesday, July 15th, 2026, from 2 pm – 4 pm. Join RPI Libraries for a study break with our July Silent Reads on July 15th— a relaxed, low-pressure gathering where people read together in silence. No discussions, no pressure, just a calm space to settle in with a good book or some coursework. If you’re not feeling reading that day, you can use the space for puzzles, crafts, or try out a new study location. Please visit the full announcement to RSVP for event updates!
item.author: Students

item.title: PaperCut Maintenance
item.description: DOTCIO will be performing scheduled maintenance on the servers hosting PaperCut occurring Tuesday 07/14/2026 afternoon (~1pm - 4pm) During this maintenance period, the server which hosts our PaperCut infrastructure will need to be upgraded. During this upgrade, anticipate printers being unavailable until the upgrade has been completed.
item.author: Community

item.title: RPI Libraries announce a change to Ebook Central downloads – farewell to Adobe Digital Editions
item.description: During the week of July 13, the new Ebook Central Reader App will replace Adobe Digital Editions as the primary offline reading solution for full downloads of Ebook Central ebooks. The new Ebook Central Reader App is a dedicated mobile and desktop app offering a more streamlined, secure, and accessible experience. The app, available on Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android, supports EPUB and PDF formats and allows users to manage their loans and devices. Learn More…
item.author: Community

item.title: RPI MAX Annual Performance Evaluations - Join HR Virtual Office Hours
item.description: Human Resources invites managers and staff to attend the upcoming Virtual HR Office Hours to answer questions regarding the RPI MAX Annual Staff Performance Evaluation process. Stop in for help with PageUp navigation, the evaluation process, timelines, and related topics. We look forward to connecting with you!
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Celebrating June Staff Promotions!
item.description:
Congratulations to our colleagues who were promoted in June! Your hard work, dedication, and commitment to excellence continue to make a meaningful impact across RPI. We celebrate your achievement and wish you continued success as you embark on this exciting new chapter. 🎉👏

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
